import React from 'react'; import { Link } from 'react-router-dom'; // Utility component for Gradient Text const GradientText = ({ children }) => ( {children} ); const Home = () => { const stats = [ { label: 'Active Candidates', value: '50k+' }, { label: 'Industries Served', value: '15+' }, { label: 'Placements Done', value: '12k+' }, { label: 'Global Partners', value: '250+' }, ]; const processSteps = [ { title: 'Sourcing', desc: 'Finding talent via global networks.' }, { title: 'Screening', desc: 'Rigorous technical interviews.' }, { title: 'Verification', desc: 'Strict background checks.' }, { title: 'Placement', desc: 'Final onboarding at client site.' }, ]; const solutions = [ { icon: '💼', title: 'Healthcare Staffing', desc: 'Connecting professionals with top medical facilities.' }, { icon: '💻', title: 'US/EU Sourcing', desc: 'Global talent sourcing for technical & IT roles.' }, { icon: '⚙️', title: 'Industrial Solutions', desc: 'Expert manpower for manufacturing & production.' }, { icon: '🍵', title: 'Hospitality & F&B', desc: 'Certified professionals for luxury service.' }, { icon: '🧪', title: 'Chemical Sector', desc: 'Experienced technicians for process management.' }, ]; const faqs = [ { q: "How long does the recruitment process take?", a: "Typically, we provide shortlisted candidates within 7-14 business days depending on the industry." }, { q: "Do you provide international staffing?", a: "Yes, we specialize in US/EU sourcing and have a robust global network." }, { q: "Is background verification included?", a: "Absolutely. Every candidate undergoes a strict 3-step document and reference verification." } ]; return (
